summary: Iteration 3 testing: Workspace n8n-config API, WebSocket execution engine, LLM real integration, AgentRun page, Settings page n8n form, AgentsList 'Executar ao Vivo' navigation. All 11 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features working correctly.

issues: LLM Provider still shows 'Mock (plugável — OpenAI/Claude/Gemini)' in the stack info card, but it's actually real (emergentintegrations). Minor display inconsistency, not functional.

action_items: Minor: Update 'LLM Provider' label in Settings Stack section from 'Mock' to 'emergentintegrations (OpenAI gpt-4o)' to reflect real integration
critical_code_review_comments: Settings: page.fill() on type='url' input doesn't trigger React onChange — use page.type() in tests. This is a Playwright-React interaction quirk, not a code bug.
AgentRun: LLM execution (4511ms) is real — EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is working with gpt-4o via emergentintegrations
WebSocket: Full message sequence confirmed: exec_id → execution_start → node_start → node_done → execution_done
Condition node correctly routes branches (5/6 nodes executed, 1 filtered by condition)
ClickMassa provider is correctly MOCKED (returns mock status 'sent')
seed_data_creation: Backend tests saved n8n-config (test-n8n.example.com / test-key), then cleared it. UI test saved n8n-test.example.com / test-api-key-abcde (config persists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new iteration 3 features tested and working: (1) GET/PUT /api/workspace/n8n-config persists per-tenant, masks api_key, returns configured boolean; (2) WebSocket wss://.../api/workspace/ws/run/{id}?token=...&input_text=... delivers full event stream; (3) LLM is REAL via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY — gpt-4o responses confirmed, NOT simulated; (4) AgentRun page at /agents/{id}/run shows React Flow canvas with status glows, right panel with input/timeline/final-output; (5) Settings page n8n form saves and badge updates to 'Configurado'; (6) AgentsList 'Executar ao Vivo' button navigates to /agents/{id}/run. ClickMassa and n8n deploy remain MOCKED.
mocked_apis: n8n deploy (not_configured — no real n8n instance)
